steps.t: Nardol Quarry is located in south-western Taur Drúadan. You should gather rocks from Nardol Quarry.
Ghân-buri-Ghân can be found in Drû Bhûta. You should bring the rocks to Ghân-buri-Ghân.
The special Púkel-man statue can be found in the Drúadan Forest, north-west of Drû Bhûta. You should repair the special Púkel-men statue.
